script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); for tuple in 'Jesus:jesusr@musculoskeletalmso.com:9b08a5fa-dd44-40d8-a7e3-598342bb98c3' 'Cameron:cameron@musculoskeletalmso.com:b5c8b236-189b-48e7-95a9-0d8c55494252' 'Ashley:ashley@musculoskeletalmso.com:b0ff0abd-e4da-4d03-bca9-047e7f0593f5'; do NAME=${tuple%%:*}; REST=${tuple#*:}; UPN=${REST%%:*}; CAT=${REST#*:}; AAD=$(az ad user show --id "$UPN" --query id -o tsv 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$AAD" ] && AAD=$(az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'$NAME')" --query '[0].id' -o tsv 2>/dev/null); CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$AAD/teamwork/installedApps" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT\"}"); echo "$NAME ($AAD) <- $CAT -> $CODE"; done
